frontend.forms.SelectLanguage.label: Language of the question

frontend.forms.submitQuestion.enumeratio: How many seconds should the challenger have to enumerate its answers?
Is the total number of answers known?
How many seconds should a player have to think and submit a bet?
frontend.forms.submitQuestion.nagui.duoI: What other proposal do you want for the duo?
What proposal is the odd one?
All the proposals must be correct, except for one (the odd one out).
frontend.forms.submitQuestion.quote.aspe: Which aspects of the quote do you want the players to guess?
frontend.forms.submitQuestion.quote.ente: Enter the parts of the quote to guess.
frontend.forms.submitQuestion.quote.part: Parts of the quote (to be entered)
The parts must not overlap and must be entered in order.
You have exceeded the maximum number of mistakes!
frontend.game.bottom.QuestionEndBottomPa: Switch directly to the next question
Reveal an element of the quote
frontend.game.middle.ReorderingMiddlePan: Please review your ordering before submitting:
Are you sure you want to submit this ordering?
frontend.game.middlePane.GameStartMiddle: This humorous and interactive program is brought to you by
frontend.game.round.RoundCompletionRateP: ✨ Drawing an incorrect link = <incorrect>{penalty} point(s) on the global score</incorrect>
✨ A variable number of points per correct answer
✨ Selecting an incorrect proposal = <incorrect>{penalty} point(s) on the global score</incorrect>
✨ <correct>{points} point per item in correct position</correct>
😨 Your accumulated points so far = your number of mistake allowances
frontend.game.round.RoundDescription.bli: 👂 Listen to the music ({songEmoji}) or the sound ({soundEmoji}), and answer the question.
🋺 Controls let you adjust the volume and skip forward or backward in the timeline.
frontend.game.round.RoundDescription.emo: 🧐 Find the work or place/character/object/... hidden behind each combination of emojis.
🧩 This combination may evoke general ideas, or it may just be a rebus, it depends.
frontend.game.round.RoundDescription.enu: 💬 Name as many elements as possible that answer the question.
frontend.game.round.RoundDescription.ima: 🧐 Find the work or place/character/object/... hidden behind each image.
frontend.game.round.RoundDescription.lab: Each question consists of an image with numbered markers.
🫳 Find the labels corresponding to the markers.
frontend.game.round.RoundDescription.mat: 🔀 A grid organized into {min} to {max} columns of proposals shown in random order, with links between them.
🔗 The goal is to find the correct associations.
frontend.game.round.RoundDescription.odd: 🔀 A list of {count} proposals shown in a random order for each participant.
If you know the odd one out, keep it secret... 🤫
frontend.game.round.RoundDescription.pro: 🕵️ A list of clues is revealed to you progressively...
🧠 Search your memory and guess the work/person/... hidden behind these clues.
frontend.game.round.RoundDescription.quo: 🫳 One, two or three of these elements are hidden: find them.
frontend.game.round.RoundDescription.reo: 🔀 A list of {min} to {max} proposals shown in a random order.
🫳 Drag and drop the items to reorder them in the correct sequence.
✅ Click Submit when you think your ordering is correct.
frontend.game.round.RoundRankingPolicy.p: {points} point per item in correct position
{points, plural, one {# point} other {# points}} per incorrect link
{points, plural, one {# point} other {# points}} per intruder found
frontend.game.round.RoundRankingPolicy.s: 😨 Your accumulated points so far = your number of mistake allowances
frontend.game.round.RoundRankingPolicy.t: where teams are ranked in {order} order of points earned.
Turn order = Inverse ranking from round {roundNumber}.
frontend.game.round.RoundRankingPolicy.v: A variable number of points per correct answer
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.basicCorr: If your answer is correct, you earn {points} point.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.basicInco: If your answer is <incorrect>incorrect</incorrect>, you earn no points.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.basicInst: ❓ Each question is assigned to a team, which must give their answer verbally.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.buzzInstr: 💡 As soon as you have an idea, buzz by clicking "Buzz". You can cancel your buzz by clicking "Cancel".
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.correctEa: If your answer is correct, you earn {points} point and the question ends.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.enumBidMe: The bid is met: the team earns {points} point, +{bonus} bonus point if they give even more answers than announced.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.enumBidNo: The bid is not met: all other teams earn {points} point.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.enumOutco: There are then two possible outcomes:
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.enumPhase: 🗣️ An answer phase during which the team with the highest bid gives their answers.
🤔 A reflection phase during which teams choose their bid.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.enumTwoPh: The question takes place in two phases:
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.incorrect: If your answer is <incorrect>incorrect</incorrect>, your attempt is invalidated and we move to the next player in the queue, if any.
If your answer is incorrect, your attempt is invalidated and we move to the next player in the queue. Furthermore, your buzzer is disabled until clue i + {delay}.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.matchingA: ⚠️ In any case, the link is drawn!
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.matchingC: If the link is <correct>correct</correct>, we move to the next team.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.matchingD: 🙅 A team is disqualified after {maxMistakes} mistakes; the question ends if all teams are disqualified.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.matchingI: If the link is incorrect, the team receives {penalty} point(s) of penalty.
🖱️ Each team takes turns and clicks on the proposals for the link it considers correct, left to right.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.matchingT: ⏳ You have between {min} and {max} seconds to decide, otherwise a random link will be drawn!
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.mcqInstru: ❓ Each question is assigned to a team. The team has several answer choices.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.mixedInst: Rules depend on the question type.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.naguiInst: ❓ Each question is assigned to a team. The team has {count} options available:
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.oddOneOut: If the proposal is <correct>correct</correct>, we move to the next team.
If the proposal is incorrect, the question ends and the team receives {penalty} point(s) of penalty. Furthermore, it becomes 1st in the turn order for the next question.
🖱️ Each team takes turns and clicks on a proposal from the list it considers correct.
ℹ️ A short explanation is shown each time.
⏳ You have {seconds} seconds to decide, otherwise a proposal will be chosen randomly!
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.partialCr: 😈 You can earn points even if you do not know all the elements!
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.queueLead: 🥇 If you are at the top of the queue, give your answer verbally.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.reorderin: 👆 Drag and drop the items to reorder them in the correct sequence, then submit your ordering.
⚠️ One submission per team — once submitted, your ordering is final!
Each item in the correct position earns {points} point for your team.
⏳ You have {seconds} seconds to submit, otherwise no points will be awarded!
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.specialCa: 💜 Stay calm, it will be fine.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.specialIn: 🗣️ Answer the questions directly — there are no answer choices.
frontend.game.round.RoundRules.thinkingT: ⏳ You have {seconds} seconds to answer, otherwise your attempt will be invalidated!
frontend.game.speedDial.GameRestartDialo: Are you sure to restart the game?
This will reset the game and all its data.
